name: Cheesy Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, egg, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, milk, onion and bread crumbs. Mix well.
2. Roll out the mixture on waxed paper into a rectangular shape about 1/2 inch thick.
3. Sprinkle cheese and mushrooms on top of the meat mixture.
4. Roll lengthwise like a jelly roll by picking up the edge of the wax paper and allowing the meat to roll over on itself.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes.
6. Add the topping blend (brown sugar, mustard, and catsup) and finish baking until the topping bubbles, about 30 minutes.
